chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1344 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For order on office objections No.1 & 2 2. For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Sethi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondents 2 & 3 Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate files power on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3, which is taken on record. He places on record Order-in-original dated 27.03.2025 and states that the matter has already been adjudicated prior to filing of this petition and the petitioner remains at liberty to assail the same in the statutory hierarchy. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he was unaware of these proceedings, however, the petitioner shall take recourse in the statutory hierarchy. In view hereof, the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
